what_it_does: This file is a retired pointer: a SQL comment block that redirects readers to the canonical, versioned ledger schema migration and asks them not to edit this file.
observations: The entire file is a single SQL comment block with no executable DDL
It is marked RETIRED / POINTER with a date of 2026-06-27
It points to build-prep/claude-design/supabase/supabase/migrations/0011_ledger.sql as the canonical home
It explicitly states the file is kept only so existing references do not dangle
It includes an anti-duplication rationale: one schema home, not two
standouts: It is a schema file that contains no schema definitions
It declares itself a deprecated pointer rather than code
It embeds a precise canonical replacement path and an anti-duplication principle
concerns: A future retirement date (2026-06-27) may confuse readers about current status
The file gives no list of which existing references still depend on it
It relies entirely on human discipline to prevent edits
notes: A placeholder comment that tells maintainers the real ledger schema now lives in a Supabase migration and to leave this file alone.
questions: Which tools or documents still reference this exact path?
Why is the retirement date set in the future?
Is the target migration already applied to the database?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to be a retired pointer, and that is exactly what the file contains.
intention_signals: It is trying to retire an old schema file without breaking existing links, steering all future changes to the canonical migration.
novelty: A .sql file whose only content is a human-readable retirement notice and redirect, containing no SQL statements at all.
contribution: It preserves the historical file location as a stable reference point and records where the canonical schema now lives, which helps existing links and bookmarks remain usable during a migration.
summary_for_embedding: A retired SQL pointer file that redirects maintainers to the canonical ledger schema migration at build-prep/claude-design/supabase/supabase/migrations/0011_ledger.sql.
intention_for_embedding: To prevent duplicate schema homes by keeping the old ledger_schema.sql path as a non-editable pointer to the versioned migration.
